# CWE-279 — Incorrect Execution-Assigned Permissions (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-279-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"os"
	"strconv"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Safe: honors the requested mode capped to owner read/write.
func StoreUpload(c *gin.Context) {
	modeStr := c.PostForm("mode")
	mode, err := strconv.ParseUint(modeStr, 8, 32)
	if err != nil || mode > 0644 {
		mode = 0644
	}
	path := "/data/uploads/" + c.PostForm("name")
	_ = os.WriteFile(path, []byte(c.PostForm("body")), os.FileMode(mode))
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"path": path})
}
